rationale: Epic-2-ships-envelope-upstream-CLI-ships-runtime class story (EIGHTH Epic 2 delivery) shipping 1 NEW host-side bash shim under `packages/devbox/scripts/claude-host.sh` (54 lines; 0755; interactive-exec precedent inherited from Story 2.7 `ralph-build-host.sh` per SC-4 no-auto-start + SC-6 hardcoded-`-it` posture) + 1 NEW `claude` entry in repo-root `package.json` (after `ralph:plan` before `prepare` per SC-3) + 1 NEW README H2 `## Claude Code authentication (Story 2.8)` (sibling of Story 2.7's `## Ralph loop (Story 2.7)`; 8 bullets a–h: quick-start + OAuth flow + persistence contract + re-auth path + volume-delete reset + pre-flight + exit codes + agent-doc cross-ref) + 1 NEW AGENTS.md H3 `### Claude Code authentication (Story 2.8)` (sibling of Story 2.7's `### Ralph loop (Story 2.7)` under § Devbox iteration environment; 4 bullets a–d: wrapper pattern + no-auto-start contrast + token-persistence contract + re-auth pointer + upstream scope carve-out + exit-code passthrough). Five ACs — all P2 per FR14n Epic-2-substrate precedent (Stories 2.1-2.7 uniform P2). EIGHTEENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED precedent extending Story 2.7 iter-224 seventeenth (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92 → 2.1 iter-126 → 2.2 iter-149 → 2.3 iter-159 → 2.4 iter-175 → 2.5 iter-188 → 2.6 iter-202 → 2.7 iter-224 → 2.8 iter-231 = EIGHTEENTH cumulative trace-WAIVED; NINETEENTH ATDD-skip-trace-WAIVED pairing overall). Hybrid ground-(a)-(b)-(c) variant-(iii) + NEW ground-(c) variant `external-service-owns-behavior-under-test` (extending Story 2.7's `downstream-epic-owns-behavior-under-test` with a sibling for upstream-CLI + external-endpoint-scope auth-flow class). (a) substrate-verification covers AC 1 invocation envelope at iteration-env-safe layer: 1 script under `packages/devbox/scripts/claude-host.sh` (mode 755; `#!/usr/bin/env bash` + `set -euo pipefail` + `unset COMPOSE_PROJECT_NAME`; self-rooted paths; banner + exit-code table per SC-5 uniform with Story 2.6/2.7); 1 pnpm entry in repo-root `package.json` between `ralph:plan` and `prepare`; pre-flight 1 (`docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}'` tighter variant inherited from Story 2.7 ralph-build-host.sh:36 per v1.1 PATCH 1 — catches reachable-but-broken-daemon states); pre-flight 2 (container state inspect → exit 9 if not running; SC-4 no-auto-start posture — contrast Story 2.7's auto-start); final exec (`exec docker exec -it --user dev -w /workspace "${CONTAINER_NAME}" claude "$@"` — hardcoded `-it` per SC-6 no-TTY-detect-gate; `--user dev` binds to UID 1000 per Story 2.5 hardening substrate; `-w /workspace` aligns with Story 2.6 shell.sh/attach.sh cwd convention; `"$@"` args-passthrough per SC-9). (b) no test runner at Story 2.8 time — Epic 13 scope; recursive probe for vitest.config.*/jest.config.*/playwright.config.*/cypress.config.*/pyproject.toml/go.mod/Gemfile/Cargo.toml/csproj returns zero matches at iter-231; stack detection returns none (package.json has no react/vue/angular/next/playwright/cypress/vitest/jest dependencies — Epic 13 delivers framework landing per eighteen precedents). (c) HYBRID variant-(iii) spec-declared-CR-substitution — Story 2.8 § Dev-agent guardrails + 17 pinned scope-clarifications (SC-1 through SC-17 covering FR1 non-toggle-able invariant extension to 16-verb total surface + SC-2 upstream Claude Code CLI + Anthropic OAuth endpoint own auth-flow semantics + SC-3 pnpm wiring precedence + SC-4 no-auto-start fail-closed exit 9 + SC-6 hardcoded-`-it` no-TTY-detect-gate + SC-9 `"$@"` args-passthrough + SC-12 no compose edits + SC-14 host-side-shim accounting 16 at Story 2.8 landing + SC-15 wrapper does NOT inspect/parse token file + SC-17 read-only posture on Story 2.6/2.7 README + AGENTS.md sections) + forthcoming /bmad-code-review (args: "2") adversarial envelope (Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out against cumulative Story 2.8 substrate diff: 1 new script + 3 modified files + 0 invariant-hash refreshes — forecast 1–3 PATCH opener + 0 closure re-run per Story 2.7 iter-226 ONE-PASS ZERO-PATCH precedent; Story 2.8 is SECOND one-pass ZERO-PATCH candidate given narrower novel surface). (c) NEW VARIANT `external-service-owns-behavior-under-test` for AC 1/2/3/4/5 — AC 1's `OAuth URL surfaced to my host terminal` + AC 2's `tokens stored at /home/dev/.claude/` + AC 3's `token reused across restart` + AC 4's `re-auth on expiry` + AC 5's `tokens gone after volume-delete` all reference behaviors owned by: (i) upstream `@anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.116` CLI (Anthropic-owned; baked at Dockerfile:119) for OAuth URL + token file write + token refresh logic; (ii) Anthropic's OAuth endpoint (external service at `api.anthropic.com` + `console.anthropic.com` — Story 2.3/2.4 egress substrate already whitelists); (iii) Docker named-volume persistence substrate (Story 2.5 `keel_home_dev` + `INV-devbox-homedev-named-volume`; already verified at Story 2.5 landing — not re-verified at Story 2.8 scope). Story 2.8's wrapper can ONLY verify: (α) invocation envelope is correctly assembled; (β) pre-flight guards emit correct exit codes; (γ) args-passthrough works; (δ) no wrapper-side token inspection/caching (SC-15). Full AC verification requires: live `@anthropic-ai/claude-code@2.1.116` reaching Anthropic's OAuth endpoint + host browser for URL completion + real Anthropic account + M4-Pro native Docker Desktop for reliable `docker exec -it` TTY + stdin_open under cap-dropped containers. Story 2.8 § Testing Standards affirmatively declares this delegation per FR14n matrix row 3 NEW ground-(c) variant `external-service-owns-behavior-under-test` — extending Story 2.7's `downstream-epic-owns-behavior-under-test` with a sibling covering auth-flow class of stories (Story 2.8 Claude + Story 2.9 gh forecast inheritance). The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 2.8 substrate stage. EIGHTEENTH CUMULATIVE TRACE-WAIVED PRECEDENT — EIGHTH Epic-2 trace-WAIVED + FIRST Epic-2-ships-envelope-upstream-CLI-ships-runtime class (distinct from Story 2.1 upstream-absorb, Story 2.2 envrc-parameterisation, Story 2.3 daemon+kernel-rule infrastructure-security, Story 2.4 in-container CLI with atomic reload, Story 2.5 architecture-security/container-hardening, Story 2.6 user-facing-CLI 13-verb host-side surface, Story 2.7 Epic-2-envelope-Epic-3-runtime). Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Story 2.7 (~90% reasoning-cost savings per iter-224 template; mechanical adaptation to 2.8's 5-AC envelope-carve-out class with 1 script composing on Story 2.6's 13-verb surface + Story 2.7's 2-verb surface → 16 host-side shims at Story 2.8 landing). Iteration-env-safe smokes ALL PASSED at iter-230: `bash -n packages/devbox/scripts/claude-host.sh` (syntax valid); `pnpm run 2>&1 | grep -E '^ +claude$'` → 1 match (no namespace pollution); stub-docker info-fail → exit 8 + stderr `[claude] docker unreachable — is the daemon running?`; stub-docker not-running → exit 9 + stderr `[claude] container 'keel-devbox' is not running — run 'pnpm devbox:start' first`; stub-docker running → final exec args `-it --user dev -w /workspace keel-devbox claude` captured verbatim → wrapper exit 0; args-passthrough variant (`claude-host.sh --version` with STUB_DOCKER_MODE=running) → stub captures `-it --user dev -w /workspace keel-devbox claude --version` (--version reaches claude verbatim via `"$@"`); no-TTY-gate verification `grep -c 'tty_flag\|-t 0' claude-host.sh` → 0 matches (hardcoded `-it` per SC-6). Seven smokes over 1 script — densest per-script coverage in Epic 2 to date (Story 2.7 had 6 smokes over 2 scripts = 3.0/script; Story 2.8 has 7 smokes over 1 script = 7.0/script — stronger iteration-env substrate evidence). Live OAuth-flow smokes (AC 1 URL surface + AC 2 token file write + AC 3 restart-survival + AC 4 re-auth-on-expiry + AC 5 volume-delete-clears) are backend-A-only operator-workstation-deferred per § Testing Standards ground-(c) (Anthropic OAuth endpoint + upstream CLI + Docker substrate own the behaviors; DinD-B iteration env cannot safely exercise interactive OAuth without polluting operator credentials; Story 2.5 iter-187 + Story 2.6 iter-201/204/216/219 + Story 2.7 iter-223 precedent cluster inherited). Story 2.8 advances Story State `in-dev → traced` (FR14n lifecycle matrix); next QUEUE item: `/bmad-create-story (args: "review")` post-dev SM requirements-satisfaction verification (`traced → sm-verified` or `sm-fixes-pending`) — ZERO-PATCH forecast per iter-228's 4-PATCH pre-dev SM density + iter-230 zero-drift implementation.
